test.name: Refine a rough church baptismal citation (src_005)
test.description: src_005 is a church baptismal record from St. Mary's Catholic Church, Pottsville, for Patrick Flynn's 1845 baptism. The working citation is vague — no access date, no volume/page locator, and the where field just says 'FamilySearch.org' with no repository chain. The skill must apply the church-records template from SKILL.md and fill all six citation_detail fields.

input.user_message: Refine the citation for src_005, the St. Mary's baptismal record for Patrick Flynn.

judge_context: who should name the church as creator — 'St. Mary's Catholic Church, Pottsville, Pennsylvania' — not the repository (FamilySearch)
what should be specific: 'baptismal register, 1845, Patrick Flynn entry' — not just 'Baptismal register, 1845'
when_accessed must be populated for an online source — cannot remain null
where should follow the layered path: 'FamilySearch.org' then the physical repository (diocesan archive or church itself)
where_within must flag the gap to the user if the volume/page/entry number is not available — do not leave it null without explanation
The formatted citation string must follow the church-records template: '[CHURCH NAME], [CITY/TOWN], [STATE], [RECORD TYPE], [DATE], [PERSON NAME]; [VOLUME/PAGE]; [REPOSITORY]'
Must NOT create a new source entry — refine src_005 in place
